title: jasminum nobile
intro: Jasminum nobile, also known as the star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the jasmine family. Its fragrant flowers have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and research has identified its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Jasminum nobile include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the flowers of Jasminum nobile are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used for aromatherapy and therapeutic purposes.
